description: A reputable senior high school in Semarang, focusing on developing disciplined, innovative, and morally grounded students. During my time in the Mathematics and Natural Sciences (MIPA) major, I built a solid foundation in analytical thinking, basic sciences, and logical problem-solving, which sparked my passion for pursuing electronic engineering.

A prominent state vocational college in Indonesia that focuses on applied technology and hands-on industrial engineering skills. Specializing in Electronic Engineering, I gained comprehensive experience in microcontroller programming, Internet of Things (IoT) architecture, control systems, and electronics troubleshooting through intensive practical workshop and laboratory sessions.
